name: Cabbage & Bacon (Irish)
recipeIngredient: Large Savoy cabbage or 2 small Savoy cabbages
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cabbage in half.
2. Boil for 15 minutes in salted water.
3. Drain, then soak in cold water for 1 minute.
4. Drain well and slice the cabbage.
5. Line the bottom of a casserole with half the bacon strips.
6. Add the cabbage on top and seasonings.
7. Pour enough stock to barely cover.
8. Add the remaining bacon strips.
9. Cover and simmer for one hour, until most of the liquid is absorbed.
